ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Banti appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

Ms. Banti stated that the Beneficiary isn't incarcerated and never has been incarcerated, and that she knows this first hand in speaking with her Client who is also the Beneficiary. The Court granted the Amended Report of Executor, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
